seo.title: HDH Consulting — Expert Study Abroad & Admissions Consulting
seo.p1: HDH Consulting helps students and families preparing for study in the US, UK, Canada, and Asia. We offer integrated consulting across university admissions, boarding school, graduate school, transfer, and extracurricular planning.
seo.p2: Founded in a top-university community, we draw on over a decade of admissions data and real acceptance outcomes — including Ivy League, QS Top 50, and Oxbridge placements. Our team approach combines application strategy, extracurricular coaching, and essay support.
seo.p3: Unlike large agencies, we deliver high-quality consulting at a fair price. Reach us by phone, KakaoTalk, or email for a free consultation.

services.pageCta: Have questions about {service}? <link>Request a free consultation</link> for a tailored strategy.

university-consulting.title: University Admissions
university-consulting.cardDescription: US, UK & Asia applications — essays, recommendations, school list
university-consulting.description: Comprehensive study abroad consulting for university applications in the US, UK, Canada, and Asia. We analyze GPA, extracurriculars, and test scores to build a strategic school list and guide you through essays, recommendations, and the full application process.
university-consulting.metaDescription: University admissions consulting for the US, UK, and Asia — school selection, essays, recommendations, and interview prep with HDH Consulting.
university-consulting.target: High school students (grades 9–12) and gap-year students
included: Custom school list aligned with target universities and majors
Common App / UCAS / country-specific application support
Personal statement planning, drafting, and revision
Recommendation letter requests and teacher guidance
highlights: Ivy League and QS Top 50 acceptance track record
Reach/Match/Safety classification based on your profile

boarding-consulting.title: Boarding School
boarding-consulting.cardDescription: Top boarding schools — SAO, SSAT prep, college pathway planning
boarding-consulting.description: Specialized consulting for admission to top US boarding schools. Drawing on experience with schools like Phillips Exeter, Andover, and Choate, we support SAO applications, SSAT preparation, and long-term college planning.
boarding-consulting.metaDescription: US boarding school consulting — SAO applications, SSAT prep, and college pathway planning with HDH Consulting.
boarding-consulting.target: Middle school students (grades 5–8) and boarding school transfer applicants
included: Boarding school research and school list development
process: Initial consultation with student and parents
School list and SSAT preparation plan

graduate-consulting.description: Expert consulting for US, UK, and European graduate programs (Master's and PhD). From SOP and PHS writing to faculty outreach and research/internship planning, we support the entire graduate admissions process.
graduate-consulting.metaDescription: Graduate school consulting for the US and UK — SOP/PHS writing, faculty outreach, and research planning.
graduate-consulting.target: University students, graduates, and working professionals
included: Graduate career planning and program matching
Recommendation letter requests and professor guidance
process: Career and major consultation and program research
highlights: Tailored strategy for students with limited research experience

extracurricular-consulting.title: Extracurricular Consulting

highlights: Coverage of Ivy League EC categories

other-consulting.title: Other Consulting Services
other-consulting.cardDescription: Essay editing, one-time application support, Resume consulting
other-consulting.description: HDH Consulting provides comprehensive study abroad consulting services.
other-consulting.intro: Our programs are designed so students can follow the application process step by step from their own perspective. We also offer one-time services such as essay editing, translation, and school research.
other-consulting.metaDescription: Essay editing and translation, one-time application roadmaps and school selection, English Resume consulting — HDH Consulting other services.
other-consulting.target: Students who need focused support for essays, applications, or Resume only
included: English essay editing, translation, and workshops
One-time application roadmap, school selection, and research
Both ongoing and one-time customized consulting
process: Initial consultation — We meet with the student and parents and recommend the right other consulting service for your needs.
Roadmap planning — We explain the steps needed to complete the service and work through solutions tailored to your profile and intended major.
Service delivery — We carry out the consulting, share progress updates, provide feedback, and complete the process.
Follow-up support — Clients who have received other consulting services can request help anytime for follow-up needs such as document preparation.
highlights: 1:1 online meetings with essayists from top universities
Resume consulting with working professionals (Big 4, startups)

serviceCategories.title: Academic Consulting
serviceCategories.subtitle: Consistent academic and career support
serviceCategories.description: Academic consulting provides comprehensive academic support. It is ideal for students wondering what to prepare for university, transfer, or graduate school admissions.
steps: 1. We begin with an initial consultation to assess academic achievement and establish career direction.
2. You receive a consultant roadmap covering course selection, grade improvement, and extracurricular support.
3. Additional academic support — essay editing, Q&A, and more — is included. If specialized tutoring is needed, we can connect you with teachers. (Tutoring may incur separate fees.)
4. Throughout the service, we hold regular academic check-ins, provide a customized curriculum, suggest majors, and help set career goals.

serviceCategories.title: Essay
serviceCategories.subtitle: English essay editing, translation, and more
serviceCategories.description: Our essay service pairs you with essayists from top universities for regular 1:1 online meetings to complete the essays you need. Beyond editing, students can attend workshops on different essay types.
steps: For one-time essay support, we follow a structured process: idea development → first draft → revisions → final version, with regular meetings throughout.
There is no limit on revisions — the service continues until you are satisfied with the final result.

serviceCategories.title: One-Time Application Services
serviceCategories.subtitle: Application roadmap, school selection, research
serviceCategories.description: One-time application services are designed to help students reach their top-university goals more efficiently. They are ideal for students who need a comprehensive solution at a reasonable price.
steps: 1. Application roadmap service: Through 1:1 meetings, we clarify each university's requirements (test scores, grades, major-aligned extracurriculars) and deliver a comprehensive application roadmap. After the meeting, you receive a PDF roadmap with final feedback.

2. School selection service: We analyze recent admissions data, objectively assess your academic profile and extracurricular record, and identify suitable universities. Through 1:1 meetings, we guide you to the best-fit schools and majors for your aptitude and abilities.

serviceCategories.title: Resume Service
serviceCategories.subtitle: English resume consulting & templates
serviceCategories.description: An English resume is essential for university admissions and internship preparation. This service suits students applying to university, transfer, graduate school, or internships who need a polished English resume. Work with professionals from startups and Big 4 consulting firms to complete a resume in your field.
steps: Our Resume service follows: consultation → draft delivery → revision and refinement → review and editing → final completion.
Through conversations with working professionals, you learn how to highlight your strengths and work together toward a successful application.

items.title: Online Application
items.description: Prepare the personal information and details required on the application. In the US, most universities use the Common App; UC schools use the UC system; others may have their own portals. Requirements, documents, and information vary by country, school, and major — always verify carefully.

items.title: Official Transcript
items.description: Obtain an official transcript from your school. If the semester has not ended, you may submit projected grades, but be sure to submit final grades once the term is complete.

items.title: Letter of Recommendation
items.description: Request letters from 1–3 teachers or counselors who know you well and can speak to your strengths. For the Common App, teachers submit directly. On other systems, you may receive the letter and upload it yourself.

items.title: SAT / TOEFL / IB / AP (Standardized Tests)
items.description: Submit predicted or final scores from standardized tests (SAT, TOEFL, IB, AP, IELTS). Scores are typically entered on the application; official results may later be sent directly to universities by the testing body (e.g., IBO).

items.title: Resume
items.description: Your English resume showcases activities and awards — volunteer work, leadership, research, programs, clubs, competitions, and more.
items.note: See our Extracurricular Consulting page for detailed Resume writing guidance.

items.title: Essay Prompt Preparation
items.description: Identify essay prompts by country and school. In the US, review Common App prompts and each university's supplemental essays. For the UK and Asia, review Personal Statement requirements.

items.title: Topic Selection & Brainstorming
items.description: Select essay topics and brainstorm experiences that best convey your message. Different prompt types — values, personality, and more — each require tailored preparation.

items.title: Essay Outline & First Draft
items.description: Outline your essay and write the first draft. Work with your essayist to plan structure by section and keyword, check what each paragraph needs, then draft the essay.

items.title: Final Draft
items.description: Edit and finalize your essay. Through regular meetings, revise as many times as needed until the essay is complete.

items.question: When should I start study abroad consulting?
items.answer: For university admissions, grades 10–11 is ideal. Boarding school applicants often begin in middle school. Graduate applicants should start 1–2 years before graduation. We'll map out a timeline based on your grade and goals.

items.question: How much does HDH Consulting cost?
items.answer: We offer high-quality consulting at rates more affordable than large agencies. Pricing depends on scope and your situation — we'll provide a detailed quote during your consultation.

items.question: Do you cover the US, UK, and Asia?
items.answer: Yes. We consult for admissions in the US, UK, Canada, Singapore, Hong Kong, and more — with strategies built on each country's system and our acceptance data.

items.question: Can I get extracurricular consulting only?
items.answer: Yes. EC consulting is available as a standalone service, including our 500+ activity database, annual planning, competition support, and portfolio development.

about.heroDescription: Born in a top-university community, HDH Consulting provides data-driven, personalized study abroad consulting for students preparing to study overseas.
storyParagraphs: Under our motto "We Thrive To Excellence," HDH Consulting offers professional yet approachable consulting for students dreaming of studying abroad.
Founded in a top-university community, we have built extensive admissions data and real acceptance experience — from Ivy League and Oxbridge to leading universities across Asia.
Unlike large agencies, we operate with lean overhead to deliver high-quality consulting at a fair price.

10+ years of study abroad consulting experience

successStories.heroDescription: Acceptance outcomes from Ivy League, QS Top 50, Oxbridge, and other top universities. Student names are anonymized to protect privacy.
successStories.sectionDescription: Every student started from a different place — personalized strategy made the difference.
successStories.cta: Start your own path with a <link>free consultation</link>.
successStories.metaDescription: See how students reached Ivy League, QS Top 50, and Oxbridge placements with HDH Consulting.

items.summary: From few ECs to Wharton ED acceptance
items.detail: With almost no extracurriculars in 11th grade, we recommended the Wharton Investment Competition aligned with the student's economics focus and provided one-on-one coaching. The student reached the semifinals, refined the essay narrative, and was admitted to UPenn Wharton via Early Decision in 2024.

items.summary: Started in 11th grade — Berkeley in 8 months
items.detail: We built an intensive 8-month roadmap starting in the second semester of 11th grade. AMC awards, campus leadership, and volunteering were organized systematically, and essays were refined for a 2025 Regular Decision acceptance to UC Berkeley Economics.

items.summary: NUS Business acceptance with GPA & AP strategy
items.detail: Before applying to NUS, we planned GPA and AP course strategy and revised the Personal Statement more than four times. The student was admitted to NUS Business in Fall 2023, with continued support for transfer planning.

items.summary: Prepared from grade 9 — accepted to Exeter
items.detail: SSAT prep and SAO writing began in grade 9. The student's curiosity and community contribution were woven into SAO essays, leading to Fall 2024 admission to Phillips Exeter Academy.
For a business graduate pivoting to public policy, we designed the SOP narrative and faculty outreach strategy. The student was admitted to Columbia SIPA's Master's Program in Fall 2025.

items.summary: Successful UCL transfer while enrolled in Korea
items.detail: While enrolled at a Korean university, we targeted UCL Economics transfer with essay writing and credit transfer strategy. The student successfully transferred in Fall 2024.
